The [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|X7-type factory station]] '''''Sentinel''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assembly plant for [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] class starfighters located near [[Gaerboud IV]].

The facility became the site of a small space battle during [[Operation: Quick Strike]] when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] starfighters tried to intercept a consignment of newly built ''TIE Avengers'' while they were transferred from the factory to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|ISD]] [[Dauntless (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Dauntless'']] by untrained workers.

The fate of the ''Sentinel'' installation is unknown. It is unlikely that the factory suffered any serious damage during the rebel attack, as it was not the target. However, even if it was not destroyed by the Rebels it is unlikely that ''Sentinel'' survived beyond the attempted coup by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] shortly after this Rebel raid, as Zaarin had great success in his initial move of destroying all ''TIE Avenger'' production facilities.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome of the space battle depends on the actions of the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' {{1st}}
